name: edding AG
summary: edding AG manufactures and distributes products for writing and marking, and visual communication in Germany, other European countries, and internationally. The Writing and Marking segment offers markers, writing utensils, spray paints, printer cartridges and toners, and also nail polish under the edding brand. The Visual Communication segment provides flip charts, whiteboards, and presentation boards and related accessories, as well as interactive products, including LED screens with touch technology for schools and conference rooms, and interactive whiteboards under the Legamaster brand. The Technological Solutions segment offers industrial marking technology, compact printing, edding code, and prisma ID solutions, as well as conductive ink for interactive packaging, brand protection, document verification, and marketing and promotion. edding AG provides its products to business-to-business sector and private end consumers. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Ahrensburg, Germany.
